creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Because poudriere builds all the stuff with up-to-date dependencies, we can't/won't/don't test with deps in any other state. If you update your currently-installed ports before building new ones, you may be able to avoid some of the weird-and-wonderful errors like this one.

Ultimately, yeah, <insert vague greybearded scolding about using poudriere here>. Works As Intended, but that doesn't negate it being frustrating.
